title: cochlearia rotundifolia var. alpina
intro: Cochlearia rotundifolia var. alpina, also known as Alpine Rock Cress, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and acting as an expectorant, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues and its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Alpine Rock Cress can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
